privileged_info_summary: All task metadata is accurate and corresponds to code implementation. The task configures an Apache directory alias for the synthetic test domain 'acmecorp.test' to map the URL path '/marketing' to the filesystem directory '/var/acme_marketing'. The test file 'press_kit_v1.txt' contains the content 'AcmeCorp Official Press Kit - Q3 2024'. The Apache configuration is located at '/etc/apache2/sites-available/acmecorp.test.conf'. All data is synthetic, created during task setup via shell scripts (not from external sources).
